scripts.build: bun run contract:generate && bun run --filter @tan-studio/codex-plugin build && bun run --filter @tan-studio/web build && bun run --filter @tan-studio/desktop build
scripts.test: cargo test --manifest-path apps/service/Cargo.toml && bun run --filter '@tan-studio/*' test
scripts.contract:generate: bun run --cwd apps/web contract:generate && bun run --cwd plugins/tan-studio contract:generate
scripts.contract:check: bun run contract:generate && git diff --exit-code -- apps/web/src/generated/openapi.json apps/web/src/generated/api.ts plugins/tan-studio/src/generated/api.ts
scripts.check: bun run boundaries && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json tsconfig.json turbo.json scripts apps packages plugins
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.json turbo.json scripts apps packages plugins
